title: Pondicherry
description: Pondicherry, officially known as Puducherry, is a vibrant Union Territory on the southeast coast of India. Known for its French colonial architecture, tree-lined streets, and serene ashrams, it offers a unique blend of spiritual tranquility and Mediterranean charm. The town is divided into the French Quarter (White Town) and the Tamil Quarter, providing a distinct cultural dichotomy. It is a popular destination for travelers seeking peaceful beaches, heritage walks, and high-quality cafes.
travel_methods: The most convenient way to reach Pondicherry is via flight to Chennai International Airport (MAA) followed by a 3-hour scenic drive, or via train to Puducherry Railway Station (PDY). Within the city, renting a bicycle or scooter is the most efficient and enjoyable mode of transport.
